horoscope: Communications and/or thoughts can be tense in spots today, dear Aries, due to a Mercury-Pluto challenge. It's best to be more careful with your money and personal information. On the one hand, this transit can help you focus, but on the other, it can limit your view, which can be skewed by worries. While you shouldn't run away from serious topics, it's better not to get caught in a game someone is playing right now. Deep thinking can eventually lead to new ideas and approaches -- even innovative ones -- as you find ways to improve your relationships and financial situation. The Moon moves to the top of your solar chart later today, and your responsibilities and goals are on your mind.

Topics of conversation, thoughts, and musings can be deeper and more serious than usual today, dear Taurus. You could be fixating on a particular idea or problem, or feel pressured to perform. There can be defensiveness in manner or speech that interferes with healthy communication now as Mercury forms a square with Pluto. Worries about impending changes related to your career or reputation, concerns about not being on top of things, or a fear of becoming less relevant or falling behind can create tension. Aim to make a plan to strengthen areas where you feel the most vulnerable, and work on this strategy one step at a time.

With today's Mercury-Pluto square, dear Gemini, you may be dealing with obstinacy or a tendency for people to take things more personally than usual. You could feel weighed down by a secret that you can't reveal or a sense that you're out of the loop on a matter. If you've been overthinking matters, the tension can peak now, or if you have too much on your plate, you may be stressing out about it. Try not to overexert yourself, and avoid stretching yourself too thin. Differences in opinion or a lack of understanding can surface. If you may feel forced to make a decision, it may make you want to dig in your heels harder! The focus can be on a private matter or an unresolved issue from your past, and it can be a real challenge to relax your mind. Do your best to detach yourself from negative thinking and perhaps even use worry to fuel efforts to fix problems.

Relationships can run hot and cold in spots today, dear Cancer, and you may be giving off some rather provocative energy even without intention. Tensions peak if you've been nursing resentment about someone who is either too clingy or too independent. Deep thinking is good, but obsessions or excessive worry will only bring you down. You can gain new insights into a matter through conflicts now, so it's important to see the creative side of dynamic interactions. However, try not to go too far out on a limb. Jumping to a quick decision without all the necessary information is possible now, or you could be stressing about a decision on the horizon. There could be drama in your social circle, and it's wise not to believe everything you hear now, as there is a lot of exaggeration happening today. Fortunately, by the end of the day, you're ready to learn from your observations.

Early today holds good energy for letting things flow and enjoying yourself, dear Leo. However, power plays might seem to dominate in your close relationships as Mercury and Pluto are in conflict. Ideally, frustrations are fuel for the motivation to fix problems and vulnerable areas. Disturbances and discontent in your professional affairs and relationships can surface nevertheless, and differences in style and tastes seem more glaring and disruptive. Be particularly vigilant when communicating today, especially professionally, formally, or publicly. What you say now can be remembered for some time! There can certainly be a fixation on something that distracts you from your priorities. However, instead of getting too worked up about minor problems now, devise a plan for making changes where you need them most.

The day can begin rather humbly, dear Virgo. However, today’s Mercury-Pluto square can certainly trigger fears and worries, and it’s helpful only if you’re focusing on something worthwhile, but a time-waster if you’re worrying or otherwise doing yourself damage. While your eye for detail is excellent, it may be at the expense of seeing the bigger picture at the moment. The facts before you and your intuition may tell you very different stories, which temporarily challenges decision-making. Consider that with this transit, differences of opinion may seem more serious or critical than usual. A particular line of thought may distract you from what you need to prioritize. Try not to put too much stock in whether or not others are catching on to your ideas and beliefs.

With today's Mercury-Pluto square, issues of control and self-control can emerge, dear Libra. You may be frustrated with a current situation. Ideally, this stirs your ambition to make improvements. However, it's best to be discriminating about what you spend your time thinking about right now. There can be so much going on in your mind that you can too easily feel stressed out. Love relationships may disappoint, or there can be a sense of imbalance in your connections. There can be significant resistance to the feeling of being controlled, but the answer to this is not to attempt to manipulate situations to regain control. Instead, it should be about practicing self-control. Frustrations with your current position in your life can prompt you to make changes, but don't push yet -- plan these things out. Remind yourself of the big difference between considering a matter and dwelling on it. The former is good for you, and the latter can wear you down.

You may be mulling over issues today, dear Scorpio, particularly related to negotiations, deals, and partnerships. You may be worried about security and stability, but examining your fears and deeper needs can help you adapt to change. Try not to worry too much if someone is not in agreement or doesn't appear to share your values. Mercury squares Pluto today, heightening fears and ambitions. It can be a time when others easily touch a nerve with you, but in the process, you might see some of the fears that can be interfering with your life. Consider whether it's a buried or hidden aspect of yourself that makes you uncomfortable. Your mind may be going to darker or deeper places today, but the process can lead to good ideas for better managing your life.

You can feel quite spirited early today, dear Sagittarius. However, the tendency to dwell on things that do you a disservice runs high as the day advances. You may be feeling under pressure in general. The hidden elements of your life take on added importance, and it's important to avoid focusing on a single train of thought, critique, or situation if it's consuming too much of your time and energy. Also, try not to take it too personally if people do not see your point of view or agree with you at the moment. A good rule of thumb today is to strive to be gentle with yourself and/or others, which means being careful with what you reveal or expose. For the best results, avoid overreacting, quick decisions, and rushed statements now, as things can be a little exaggerated. Soon enough, your vision will broaden, and frustrations can easily turn into new ideas for making improvements.

Today’s Mercury-Pluto square can bring out mental tension, dear Capricorn. While early today you are most interested in what's best for you, as the day advances, you can be less focused on enjoying conversations and more on proving something! However, if you center your thoughts on what you’re doing and what can be accomplished, this can be a good time for gaining new insight into a matter or furthering a project through research or deeper concentration. You might only need a slight change of pace to feel back on track romantically or emotionally. However, keep in mind that communications are tricky for now, and that the tendency to dwell on problems is strong with this transit. If you get the sense that there is a price attached to whatever others are asking of you now, you may be right.

Keep in mind that while your focus will enlarge soon enough, you may not be seeing beyond the frustrations of the moment in spots today, dear Aquarius. Minor problems can seem larger than life, as you may be giving more power to a matter than they deserve. Look for the light at the end of the tunnel, and avoid making decisions until you've entertained different perspectives. Note that resentment or frustration can emerge through communications today, and you may want to hold back from too-quick reactions or responses. The same old patterns of relating that put you in a frustrated or stagnant position don't have to repeat, but it takes special effort to break the pattern.

Early today, you're focusing on what helps you grow, dear Pisces. However, tense issues can surface or be triggered as Mercury squares Pluto today. They can temporarily interfere with healthy communication and thinking. You may be wrestling with some feelings of guilt and anxiety, which can skew thinking. Instead of allowing these things to fester and to undermine your happiness, try to pinpoint the source and work on resolving frustrated feelings or resentments. Watch for double meanings in people’s communications. Weeding out information that holds little value can be challenging today, but it is necessary for a sense of peace.
